description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style electric fan with a circular metal grille protecting three broad, slightly curved blades. The fan's body and base are made of a metallic material with a muted bronze or beige finish, giving it a retro appearance. The base is sturdy and slightly flared, supporting a curved arm that connects to the main motor housing. A visible power cord extends from the rear of the base, ending in a standard two-prong plug. The fan's grille consists of concentric rings and radial supports, providing both safety and structural integrity. No visible control panel or switches are present on the exterior, suggesting manual or rear-mounted controls.
description: A vintage-style tabletop electric fan with a metal grille, three broad blades, and a bronze finish, featuring a visible power cord and sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular metal grille and three broad fan blades.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved support arm, motor housing, and the depth of the grille.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the motor housing and the attached power cord with plug.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fan's profile, support arm, and grille structure.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard is a circular metal grille composed of concentric rings connected by evenly spaced radial supports, providing both protection and visibility.
